Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single message in a conversation with Zoya.

isModel.description: True if the message is from Zoya, false if from the user.

uid.description: The UID of the user who owns this message.

VoiceProfile.title: VoiceProfile
VoiceProfile.description: A customizable persona and voice configuration for Zoya.

name.description: The name of the profile (e.g., 'Sassy Zoya', 'Professional Zoya').

personality.description: The system instruction defining personality and speech patterns.

uid.description: The UID of the user who owns this profile.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the user's active profile.
